description: Goal: FunctionSource becomes raw quoted source, and function-local expansion moves behind function demand. Signal: ScopeCode publishes raw function source without expanding ordinary do-bodies; DefineFunction waits on a staged expanded-function fact and only then decodes FunctionSurface; the final expanded quoted source still matches what the eager path would have produced. Strategy: introduce the new fact/job, move the existing function-body expansion walk there, and add tests/telemetry proving scope jobs no longer wait on body-local macros for undemanded functions.
title: Compiler2 function staging: add staged expanded-function facts and make DefineFunction demand them
